name: Quoter
short: Send quote embeds with optional author
description: Sends quote embeds to a configured guild channel. Use `quoteset` to set the destination channel and optionally enable auto-deletion for the interactive prompt; `quote` posts the quote and lets the user optionally pick an author.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild settings (quote channel and auto-delete preference) but does not persistently store any personal user data.
install_msg: Thanks for installing! Run `[p]quoteset channel #channel` to configure where quotes are posted, then use `[p]quote <text>`.
author: sravan
